@startuml actor Admin participant "AddEventPage" as AddEventPage participant "AddEventFormContainer" as AddEventFormContainer participant "AddClassPopupContainer" as AddClassPopupContainer participant ":ClassForm" as ClassForm participant ":ClassService (Frontend)" as FrontEndClassService participant ":ShiftService (Frontend) :Router" as Router database ":Booking-Class-DB\n(StorageGRPC Transport)\n:MaterialService:NatsStreaming" as BookingDatabase Admin -> AddEventPage: Click 'Attach New Class' Button activate AddEventPage AddEventPage->>AddEventFormContainer: attach(Class()) activate AddEventFormContainer AddEventFormContainer-->>AddEventPage: attach() deactivate AddEventFormContainer add note right of AddEventPage #lightgreen:green;Rendered;#white else Rendered note left of AddEventPage #red:red;Data Valid"#black

\nalt "Is Valid Transaction"\nopt ["has materials"]\nclass := CommitFile(context, ProtoBuffer()\nlink Create(class.payload))\nisCreated FindContext([SliceConditions]) classes publishClassesCreated(data);published BadRequest UnprocessableEntity class response = Response(nil) else alt [Data Invalid] or IsInvalidTransaction():ProtoResponse();class:=CreateModel(Create(),context.class uuid has_materials?Commitfile(proto.buffer link create(payload));iscreated find(sliceconditions).classes.publish(classes.created.data published badrequest unprocessibleentity .response=respone(nill end if endif @enduml
